title.en: OpenAI to Acquire Astral, the Company Behind uv, ruff, and ty
title.zh: OpenAI 收购 Astral：Python 工具链核心项目 uv、ruff、ty 易主

summary.en: OpenAI announced it will acquire Astral, the company behind Python's increasingly essential toolchain: uv (package/environment manager with 126M+ monthly PyPI downloads), ruff (linter/formatter), and ty (type checker). The Astral team will join OpenAI's Codex team. Both sides have committed to keeping the projects open source, but Simon Willison notes the distinction between product+talent and talent-only acquisitions. The deal raises questions about corporate stewardship of load-bearing open source infrastructure.
summary.zh: OpenAI 宣布收购 Astral 公司，后者是 Python 工具链三大核心项目的开发商：uv（包/环境管理器，PyPI 月下载量超 1.26 亿）、ruff（Linter/Formatter）和 ty（类型检查器）。Astral 团队将加入 OpenAI 的 Codex 团队。双方承诺继续维护开源，但 Simon Willison 指出「产品+人才」收购可能最终变成纯人才收购。这笔交易引发了对企业托管关键开源基础设施的广泛讨论。

title.en: Claude Code Channels: Push External Events into Running Sessions
title.zh: Claude Code 新功能 Channels：向运行中的会话推送外部事件

summary.en: Claude Code introduced Channels, a new mechanism that lets MCP servers push messages, alerts, and webhooks into a running Claude Code session. This enables CI results, chat messages (Telegram/Discord), and monitoring events to reach Claude while you're away from the terminal. Channels are two-way—Claude can read events and reply through the same channel. Currently in research preview, requiring v2.1.80+ and claude.ai login.
summary.zh: Claude Code 推出 Channels 功能，允许 MCP 服务器向运行中的会话推送消息、告警和 Webhook。这意味着 CI 结果、Telegram/Discord 聊天消息、监控事件等都能在你离开终端时送达 Claude。Channel 支持双向通信——Claude 可以读取事件并通过同一通道回复。目前处于研究预览阶段，需要 v2.1.80+ 版本和 claude.ai 登录。

title.en: Anthropic Takes Legal Action Against OpenCode
title.zh: Anthropic 对 OpenCode 发起法律行动

summary.en: Anthropic sent legal requests to OpenCode (126k GitHub stars), the open-source AI coding CLI tool. A PR titled 'anthropic legal requests' was submitted by thdxr and merged into the dev branch. The move signals Anthropic's stance on third-party tools accessing its API or using its brand. This is notable as AI coding tools proliferate and the boundaries between official and community tools become contentious.
summary.zh: Anthropic 向开源 AI 编程 CLI 工具 OpenCode（GitHub 126k star）发出法律函件。一个名为「anthropic legal requests」的 PR 由 thdxr 提交并合并到 dev 分支。此举表明 Anthropic 对第三方工具调用其 API 或使用其品牌的态度。随着 AI 编程工具的爆发式增长，官方工具与社区工具之间的边界问题正变得日益敏感。

title.en: Cloudflare Workers AI Now Runs Large Models, Starting with Kimi K2.5
title.zh: Cloudflare Workers AI 正式支持大模型推理，首发 Kimi K2.5

summary.en: Cloudflare announced Workers AI can now run frontier open-source models, launching with Moonshot AI's Kimi K2.5. The model offers a full 256k context window with multi-turn tool calling, vision inputs, and structured outputs. Cloudflare has been using it internally—their security review agent processes over 7B tokens/day with Kimi, catching 15+ confirmed issues in a single codebase, at a fraction of the cost of proprietary models (estimated $2.4M savings). This enables running entire agent lifecycles on a single platform.
summary.zh: Cloudflare 宣布 Workers AI 正式支持前沿开源大模型推理，首发 Moonshot AI 的 Kimi K2.5。该模型提供 256k 上下文窗口，支持多轮工具调用、视觉输入和结构化输出。Cloudflare 内部已将其用于安全审查 Agent，每天处理超 70 亿 token，在单个代码库中发现 15+ 已确认问题，相比私有模型预估节省约 240 万美元。这使得在单一平台上运行完整的 Agent 生命周期成为可能。

title.en: How Squad Runs Coordinated AI Agents Inside Your Repository
title.zh: GitHub Copilot Squad：仓库内多 Agent 协同工作流的设计模式

summary.en: GitHub published an inside look at Squad, a repository-native orchestration system for GitHub Copilot that coordinates multiple AI agents within a single repo. The post details design patterns for multi-agent workflows that remain inspectable, predictable, and collaborative. It represents GitHub's vision for scaling AI-assisted development beyond single-agent interactions to team-level coordination.
summary.zh: GitHub 发布了 Copilot Squad 的深度解析——一个在仓库内原生编排多个 AI Agent 的协同系统。文章详细介绍了保持可检查、可预测和可协作的多 Agent 工作流设计模式。这代表了 GitHub 将 AI 辅助开发从单 Agent 交互扩展到团队级协同的技术愿景。

title.en: LangSmith Fleet: Enterprise Workspace for Building and Managing Agent Fleets
title.zh: LangSmith Fleet：企业级 Agent 舰队管理平台

summary.en: LangChain rebranded Agent Builder to LangSmith Fleet, an enterprise workspace for creating, deploying, and managing agents at scale. Fleet introduces agent identity and credentials management, tiered permissions (clone/run/edit), cross-team sharing, an inbox for human-in-the-loop approvals, and full observability. The shift reflects how the hard problem in enterprise AI has moved from building individual agents to governing fleets of them.
summary.zh: LangChain 将 Agent Builder 升级更名为 LangSmith Fleet，一个企业级 Agent 工作空间。Fleet 引入了 Agent 身份与凭证管理、分级权限控制（克隆/运行/编辑）、跨团队共享、人工审批收件箱和完整可观测性。这一转变反映出企业 AI 的核心挑战已从「构建单个 Agent」转向「治理 Agent 舰队」。

title.en: Cursor Composer 2 Model Exposed as Rebadged Kimi K2.5
title.zh: Cursor Composer 2 被证实套壳 Kimi K2.5，引发许可证争议

summary.en: Cursor released Composer 2 as a supposedly proprietary model, but researchers intercepted requests revealing it as a fine-tuned version of Moonshot AI's Kimi K2.5. Cursor acknowledged using K2.5, claiming the license was obtained through partner Fireworks AI. The incident raises transparency concerns about AI coding tools' underlying model sources.
summary.zh: Cursor 发布了号称自研的 Composer 2 模型，但研究者通过截获请求实锤其为 Kimi K2.5 微调版本。Cursor 随后承认使用 K2.5，称许可证通过合作伙伴 Fireworks AI 获取。事件暴露了 AI 编程工具对底层模型来源的透明度问题。

title.zh: VoidZero 发布 Vite+：统一 Web 开发工具链

summary.en: Evan You's VoidZero released Vite+, unifying Vite, Vitest, Oxlint, Oxfmt, Rolldown, tsdown, and Vite Task into a single zero-config CLI. It manages runtime, package manager, and frontend toolchain with commands like vp dev/check/build/test, supports monorepo task orchestration and caching. MIT licensed, 3000+ GitHub stars. A major milestone in VoidZero's roadmap to rewrite the JS toolchain in Rust.
summary.zh: 尤雨溪的 VoidZero 发布 Vite+，通过单一 CLI 将 Vite/Vitest/Oxlint/Oxfmt/Rolldown/tsdown/Vite Task 整合为零配置工具链。用 vp dev/check/build/test 等命令替代多个独立工具调用，支持 monorepo 任务编排和缓存。MIT 开源，已获 3000+ GitHub star。这是 VoidZero「用 Rust 重写 JS 工具链」路线图的重要里程碑。

title.en: Anthropic Launches Claude Code Plugin Directory
title.zh: Anthropic 发布 Claude Code 官方插件目录

summary.en: Anthropic released the official Claude Code plugin directory, establishing a plugin marketplace ecosystem. Plugins can include MCP server configs, slash commands, and agent definitions, installable via /plugin install. The directory is split into internal (Anthropic-maintained) and external (community/partner) plugins, with external submissions requiring quality review. 14k+ GitHub stars.
summary.zh: Anthropic 发布 Claude Code 官方插件目录，建立插件市场生态。插件可包含 MCP 服务器配置、斜杠命令和 Agent 定义，通过 /plugin install 一键安装。目录分为内部（Anthropic 维护）和外部（社区/合作伙伴）插件，外部提交需通过质量审核。GitHub 已获 1.4 万 star。

title.zh: Chrome DevTools MCP：Google 官方 MCP 服务器，让 AI Agent 操控浏览器

summary.en: The Chrome DevTools team released an official MCP server enabling AI coding agents (Gemini, Claude, Cursor, Copilot) to directly control and inspect running Chrome browsers. Built on Puppeteer, it provides performance recording and analysis, network request inspection, console logs with source maps, screenshots, and reliable browser automation. 30k+ GitHub stars.
summary.zh: Chrome DevTools 团队发布官方 MCP 服务器，让 AI 编程 Agent（Gemini、Claude、Cursor、Copilot 等）能直接控制和检查运行中的 Chrome 浏览器。基于 Puppeteer 构建，提供性能录制与分析、网络请求检查、带 source map 的控制台日志、截图和可靠的浏览器自动化。GitHub 超 3 万 star。

title.en: The Three Pillars of JavaScript Bloat
title.zh: JavaScript 依赖膨胀的三大根源

summary.en: A deep analysis of why npm dependency trees are bloated...
summary.zh: 深度分析 npm 依赖树膨胀的三大根源...

title.en: Cursor Adds Millisecond-Level Search Across Millions of Files
title.zh: Cursor 新增大规模代码库毫秒级搜索

summary.en: Cursor has shipped a new search capability that can find results across millions of files in milliseconds, addressing a key pain point for developers working in large monorepos and enterprise codebases. The feature leverages optimized indexing to make AI-assisted code navigation practical at scale.
summary.zh: Cursor 推出全新搜索功能，可在数百万文件中实现毫秒级检索，解决了大型 monorepo 和企业级代码库开发者的核心痛点。该功能通过优化索引技术，使 AI 辅助代码导航在大规模项目中真正可用。

title.en: GitHub Releases spec-kit: A Toolkit for Spec-Driven Development
title.zh: GitHub 发布 spec-kit：规格驱动开发工具包

summary.en: GitHub's spec-kit is a Python toolkit designed for Spec-Driven Development workflows, integrating with GitHub Copilot for AI-assisted specification writing and implementation. The project has rapidly gained 81K+ stars, signaling strong community interest in structured approaches to AI-assisted software development where specs guide code generation.
summary.zh: GitHub 推出 spec-kit，一个面向规格驱动开发（Spec-Driven Development）的 Python 工具包，与 GitHub Copilot 集成实现 AI 辅助的规格编写和代码实现。该项目已获得 81K+ Star，反映出社区对以规格文档引导 AI 生成代码这一结构化开发方式的强烈兴趣。

summary.en: TypeScript 6.0 is officially released as the last version built on the current JavaScript codebase. Key improvements include less context-sensitivity on this-less functions, enhanced type-checking for generic JSX expressions, deprecation of import assertion syntax in import() calls, and updated DOM types reflecting latest web standards including Temporal APIs. This release is primarily a transition release preparing developers for TypeScript 7.0, which will be a ground-up native port with significant performance improvements.
summary.zh: TypeScript 6.0 正式发布，这是基于当前 JavaScript 代码库的最后一个主版本。主要改进包括：无 this 函数的上下文敏感性优化、泛型 JSX 表达式的类型检查增强、import() 调用中 import assertion 语法的废弃，以及反映最新 Web 标准的 DOM 类型更新（含 Temporal API 调整）。这是一个过渡版本，为开发者迁移到即将到来的 TypeScript 7.0（完全用原生代码重写，性能大幅提升）做准备。
